title: Love Commander
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Commander}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Love Commander'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' |line= |model=[[Luxury 2400 yacht]] |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=50 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=*Pop-up [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Autoturret/Legends|turret]] *[[Concussion missile/Legends|Concussion missile]] |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Yacht/Legends|Yacht]] |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |affiliation= |navy= |fleet= |owners=*[[Bescat Offdurmin]] *[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Incoming craft, this is ''Spinnerfish'', Galactic Alliance Second Fleet. Cut your sublight engines and identify yourself immediately.''"
"''Hello! I'm Bescat Offdurmin, master of the private yacht ''Looooove Commander''! What's a Spinnerfish?|''[[Spinnerfish]]'' contacts Lando Calrissian as he attempts to run the blockade of Corellia|}} The '''''Love Commander''''' was a [[Luxury 2400 yacht]]. Its [[Bescat Offdurmin|original owner]] lost the ship in a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game to [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. It had a sky-blue and green exterior paint job and specially rebuilt sublight engines which gave it considerable speed in [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]], despite its mediocre [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] capabilities. The interior of the ship was lavishly decorated, including a replica of a famous waterfall on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], although the yacht did boast hidden weapons, including a laser turret and a missile launcher, and a shield generator. However, one weakness of the ship's defensive capabilities was its relatively long power up time. After [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] ordered an attack on the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] which severely damaged it, Lando loaned the use of ''Love Commander'' to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]], coming along with them to act as the ship's [[Captain/Legends|captain]]. Since the ship was still registered under the original owner's name, it would be much less conspicuous for them to use than their own ship or another one of Lando's. Calrissian had a habit of referring to the ship as ''Looooove Commander'' in communications, partly to enhance the verisimilitude of his [[Bescat Offdurmin]] alias. The ship was able to penetrate the blockade over [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and evade a [[TIE crawler/Legends|TIE Crawler]]. While escaping from the planet, the ship helped down a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] trying to stop them. After Jacen Solo [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|attacked]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], Lando and the ''Love Commander'' helped to help fight the fires started by [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'''s]] long-range turbolasers. When Lando discovered that his [[Tendra Risant Calrissian|wife]] was pregnant, he left the ''Love Commander'' with Han and Leia Solo for firefighting purposes and any others for which they could use it. Leia and, covertly, [[Jagged Fel]], [[Zekk]], Han and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] used the ship to gain access to Jacen's flagship. The "[[Alema Rar|Alema]]-hunters" and Han stayed in the smuggling compartments of the ''Love Commander'' until they were able to sneak out and complete their information-gathering mission on Jacen's personal shuttle and escape. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' *[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']] {{Ab|Millennium Falcon (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|landocalrissian|Calrissian, Lando}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Liebeskommandant }} [[Category:Luxury 2400 yachts]]
